title: dombeya mollis
intro: Dombeya mollis, also known as the silver bell, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Sterculiaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts have been shown to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. In traditional medicine, dombeya mollis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to support various health conditions, and its leaves are used in soups to treat malaria and fever.
